name: Canton Strategic Holdings, Inc.
business: Canton Strategic Holdings, Inc. (CNTN) is a publicly traded company that leverages Canton Coin (CC) and supports the Canton Network to advance institutional blockchain adoption and digitization of financial markets. It also operates clinical-stage biotech research and development programs, developing therapeutic candidates in immunology and inflammation, such as GV104 for opioid overdose protection and GV023 for oral TNF-alpha inhibition. The company generates value through validator operations on the Canton Network and holds a strategic digital asset reserve of CC.
sellsTo: institutional investors and financial institutions for digital asset treasury and blockchain services
military and first responder populations for GV104
patients with inflammatory and immunologic conditions for biotech candidates

exposures.sentence: Through our subsidiary Gravitas, we develop therapeutic candidates in immunology and inflammation with high unmet need.
We are the first publicly traded company to leverage Canton Coin (CC) and support the Canton Network to advance institutional blockchain adoption and the digitization of financial markets.

We face risks relating to the custody of our CC tokens, including the loss or destruction of private keys required to access our CC tokens and cyberattacks or other data loss relating to our CC tokens, including smart contract related losses and vulnerabilities.

catalysts.event: Initiate rolling NDA submission for GV104
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate initiating a rolling NDA submission in the first half of 2027, with FDA approval anticipated in the first half of 2028.
